## Description

A clear description of the changes and why they are needed.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Affected Packages

List the `@totemsdk/*` packages affected by this change.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Parity tests pass (for cryptographic changes)
- [ ] All existing tests pass

## Cryptographic Changes Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] Reviewed by at least 2 maintainers
- [ ] Parity tests pass against Java reference implementation
- [ ] Backward compatibility verified
- [ ] Security impact assessment included
- [ ] No new cryptographic dependencies added without review
- [ ] WOTS key usage follows lease/watermark protocol
- [ ] Serialization matches Java byte-for-byte

## Documentation

- [ ] JSDoc comments added for public APIs
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] API reference regenerated if needed
- [ ] Changelog entry added

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them and the migration path.

## Additional Notes

Any other information reviewers should know.
